titleStmt.title: SII 22.388: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 388. (A.R. No. 388 of 1906) TIRUCHIRAPALLI DISTRICT, PUDUKKOTTAI STATE, TIRUMAYYAM. ROCK-CUT TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. MĀR. TRIBH. SUNDARA-PĀṆḌYADĒVA (II)—10 + 1st YEAR (A.D. 1249-50).

summary.p: The inscription is damaged in places. It records an endowment of some lands measuring 8 mā in extent, as ūrkkīḻ-īṟaiyili by the Sabhā of Tirumayyam for the maintenance of the Uvachchar in the temple of Mahādēvar, at the instance of the representatives of the Nāḍu, Nagaram and the villages. The epigraph makes a reference to the settlement of the dispute mentioned in No. 387 above. A certain Tiruvēṅgaḍattunambi is said to have made a representation to (daṇḍanāyakkar) Appaṇṇar on behalf of the temple on this matter, in answer to which the above permission was accorded to the Sabhā for the endowment.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . komāṟupaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉa cakkaravarttikaḷ śrīsundara pāṇṭiyatevaṟkku yāṇṭu pat
tāvataṉ Etirāmāṇṭu kāṉaṉāṭāṉa virutarājabhayaṅkara vaḷanāṭṭu kāṉa nāṭṭu tevatāṉa bra
hmadecam tirumeyattu sabhaiyom Ivvūr mahādevar koyil Āti caṇḍeśvara tevaṟkku
kalveṭṭikoḷḷa piṭipāṭu paṇṇikuṭutta paricāvatu Itevaṟkku vaiṣṇavamāheśvaram tiṉ
tu kalveṭṭiṉa nāḷil tiruveṅkaṭattu nampiyai Iraṇṭu māṟkaṅ kaḷukkum nāṭukaḷukkum nakara
ṅkaḷukkum kirāmaṅkaḷukkum Icaiya porunta colli tāṟkiṟapotu Ivvūr mahādevar koyi
lukku koṭṭukiṟa Uvaccaṟkku Iṭukaikku tevarkaḷ kaṭamai niṅkallāka niṉṟa kaṭamai kuṭimai Iṟai
t tevatānammāka Ivvūr teṉpiṭākaip pāppār vayalil karumāṇikka vayal laṟutte Aṉupavi
ttu Iṟaiyāṟṟāmai Ūr potuvāka pokaṭṭa nilattilum civappirāmaṇar Ūṟpotuvāka pokaṭṭa
nilattilum Āka Inilattile tarattiṉkīḻ Iraṇṭu mānilattukku virivum Eṭṭu mānilam viṭukaveṉ
ṟu tiruveṅkaṭattu nampi Appaṇṇaṟku Āka mellūṟkku vakaiyāy naṟ centāmaraik kaṇṇaṉ
kaiyile Eṭuttu varuka Eṉṟu māheśvarar coṉṉa Itukku pattāvatiṉ Etirāmaṇṭu Āṭimātam
nāṭukaḷum nakaraṅkaḷum kirāmaṅkaḷum kūṭiiruntu śrīkāriyam vicāritta yiṭattu tiruveṅkaṭattu nampi
Iṭṭamai Uṇṭākaiyāle Ittarattiṉkiḻ Iraṇṭu mānilamum teyvaṅkaḷ kaṭamai niṅkallāka mā
tevar koyillukku koṭṭukiṟa Uvaccaṟku Iṭukaikku tevatāṉamāka viṭaveṇumeṉṟu nāṭukaḷum
nakaraṅkaḷum kirāmaṅkaḷum Eṅkaḷai Aḻaiccu Innilam viṭaccollukaiyāl tiruveṅkaṭattu nampi centā
maraikkaṇṇaṉ kaiyil Iṭṭa māṉum miṇṭu nāṅkaḷ tevarkaḷ kaṭamai niṅkalāka tevatāṉam
Ūṟkiḻ Iṟaiyilikkāraāḻmai Āka viṭṭa nilamāvatu Ivvūriṟ teṉa piṭākai pāppār vayal
Ūṟpotuvāṉa nilattil māceyyāṉa mātevarc cennilam mukkāṇi Araikkāṇi muntirikai
kiḻmukkāle muṉṟu mā mukkāṇiyum Ittuṭai nilam Araikkāṇi muntirikai kiḻaraikālum Ūr
kalaṅkāra mayakkal nilam kāṇi Araikkāṇi muntirikaiyum Itaṉ vaṭakku neṭuṅkaṇ taṭi Iraṇṭiṉā
l nilam Araimā Araikkāṇi muntirikaiyum citevivayakkal tuṭavai nilam kiḻmukkāle nālumākāṇi
kku viṭṭa neṭuṅkaṇ nilam kāṇimuntirikaiyum kuṉṟacey nilam Araik kāṇi muntirikaiyum Itaṉ
vaṭakkitu nilam Araikkāṇiyum Aḷaṟṟukkāḷaṉ tuṭaval nilam Araik kāṇi kiḻ mukkālemuṉṟu mā
mukkāṇiyum karaikkiḻ ceynnilam Arai mā muntirikaikkiḻeḻumā varaiyum naṭuviṟneṭuṅkaḷakkuṭi
nilam Araimāvum Itaṉ vaṭakkil neṭuṅkaḷa nāṟkāṇi kiḻkkālum Itaṉ melatu nilam mākā
ṇi Araikkāṇiyum Itaṉ kiḻatu taṭi Iraṇṭiṉāl nilam muntirikaiyum teṉkiḻakku nilam muntirikaiyum
kiḻ Eṭṭumā mukkāṇiyum neṭuṅkaṇ kiḻataṟkiḻatu nilam muntirikaikkiḻ mākāṇiyum
ya nilam kāṇi muntirikaiyum Umai naṅkai vayakkal nilam kāṇi muntirikaiyum Aiñcāñceyakaṭṭa
raimā Araikkāṇi muntirikaiyum Itaṉ vaṭakkatu nilam kāṇi Araikkāṇi muntirikaikiḻ māvaraiyum
� toḷvayakkal kāṇi Araikkāṇi kiḻ muṉṟumā mukkāṇiyum keḷḷuvan tuṭaval nilaṅkāṇi munti
rikaik kiḻaraiyum meṟpaṭi cey nilam Araikkāṇiyum meṟpaṭi ce nilam muntirikaiyum
vayakkal vaṭakkatu nilam Araikkāṇikkiḻkkālum virivunilam Eṭṭumāvum Iṉilattuppaṭṭa kiḻno
kkiṉa kiṇaṟum menokkiya maramum Uṭpaṭa Ivvaṉaittukkum Uṭpaṭṭa virivu nilam Eṭṭumāvum
ṅkaḷ kaṭamai niṅkalāka tevatāṉamāka viṭṭu Iṉilattāluḷḷa Accuvari Ūrviṉiyokam nāṭṭu
viṉiyokam Eccoṟu kūṟṟarici veṭṭimuṭṭāvāḷ maṟṟum vari Oṭuppaiyum nāṭṭiṟai
yiliyāka vari Iṭumavaiyum tevarkaḷ kaṭamai niṅkalāka Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭuttu tevarkaḷ kaṭamai
kaḷāka Iṟaiyili kārāṇmai Ākak kalveṭṭik koḷvatākap piṭipāṭu paṇṇikkuṭuttom tirumey
yattu sabhaiyom Ivvūr mahādevar koyilil Āticaṇḍeśvaratevaṟku Ippaṭikku Ivai
paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kollikāval nampi Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Ilaṅkai veḷāṉ Eḻu
ttu Ippaṭikku Ivai meyyapiḷḷai Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Uttama nampi Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai
tu nampi Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kulacekarapperumāḷ Eḻuttu
ppaṭikku Ivai Uyyakkoṇṭaraiyar Eḻuttu Aṭikaḷ colpaṭikku
vāy melūrāṇṭāṉ Eḻuttu māheśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 22.388 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
